name: voyant-bookings-travelers-section
title: Booking Travelers Section
description: Multi-row traveler list for booking-create: name + email + role (lead / adult / child / infant) + optional room assignment, with add/remove. Parent creates CRM people + booking_travelers rows at submit time.
